name: Nasheet Waits
abstract: Nasheet Waits is an American jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Jason Moran, Piano, and The Big Bandwagon

about_quotes.speaker: Orrin Evans
about_quotes.evidence: outside of another co-led group I’m in called Tarbaby with Eric Revis and Nasheet Waits

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: There are so many great drummers out there right now. Nasheet Waits, Cindy Blackman just to name a few.

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: Of course Eric is my latest, and then there’s Nasheet Waits. Nasheet is bad.
